title: astelia nervosa
intro: Astelia nervosa, also known as Astelia or Wharawhara, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and anxiety due to its sedative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Astelia nervosa include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as easing symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
